official_names.en: Engineer / Specialist in Humanities / International Services
official_names.zh-Hans: 工程师/人文专家/国际服务

aliases: 技術・人文知識・国際業務

status_note_md.en: Japan's Immigration Services Agency publishes the status and application-document requirements in Japanese. This fixture is limited to the retained status page and remains under human review.
status_note_md.zh-Hans: 日本移民厅以日语发布身份和申请文件要求。本数据记录仅限于保留的状态页面，并仍在人工审核中。

summary_md.en: A Japan work residence status for technical, humanities, and certain foreign-culture-based activities performed under a contract with a public or private institution in Japan.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 根据与日本公共或私人机构签订的合同进行的技术、人文和某些外国文化活动的日本工作居留身份。

good_for_md.en: Professionals whose proposed role fits the listed engineering, humanities, translation, design, language-teaching, marketing, or related activities and who have a qualifying contract with an institution in Japan.
good_for_md.zh-Hans: 拟议职位符合所列工程、人文、翻译、设计、语言教学、营销或相关活动，并且与日本机构签订了合格合同的专业人员。

not_good_for_md.en: Applicants seeking a general self-sponsored or remote-income status. The retained ISA page describes institution-based work and does not establish a universal salary, family, PR, or citizenship rule.
not_good_for_md.zh-Hans: 寻求一般自费或远程收入状态的申请人。保留的 ISA 页面描述了基于机构的工作，并未建立普遍的工资、家庭、PR 或公民身份规则。

note_md.en: The ISA application materials distinguish education and relevant-work-experience evidence by activity and applicant category; this fixture does not generalize one universal threshold.
note_md.zh-Hans: ISA 申请材料按活动和申请人类别区分教育和相关工作经验证据；本数据记录并没有概括出一个通用阈值。

note_md.en: Relevant education or work-history evidence is required in the application materials, with conditions varying by the activity and applicant.
note_md.zh-Hans: 申请材料中需要提供相关的教育或工作经历证据，条件因活动和申请人而异。

stability_requirement_md.en: The status is based on paid activity under a contract with an institution in Japan; the retained page does not state a universal salary minimum.
stability_requirement_md.zh-Hans: 该状态基于与日本机构签订的合同下的付费活动；保留的页面没有规定普遍最低工资。

application_processing_time_md.en: The ISA page provides application procedures and document categories but no single processing-time value in the retained text.
application_processing_time_md.zh-Hans: ISA 页面提供了申请程序和文档类别，但保留文本中没有单个处理时间值。

summary_md.en: The retained ISA status page does not establish a permanent-residence pathway.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 保留的 ISA 状态页面不会建立永久居留途径。

summary_md.en: The retained ISA status page does not establish a citizenship pathway.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 保留的 ISA 状态页面并未建立公民身份途径。

rationale_md.en: The official ISA page clearly states covered activities, institution-based contracts, status periods, and application materials, but much of the evidence is Japanese and role/category-specific.
rationale_md.zh-Hans: ISA 官方页面清楚地说明了涵盖的活动、基于机构的合同、状态期限和申请材料，但大部分证据都是日语的且针对特定角色/类别。

changelog.summary: Added a conservative Japan Engineer/Specialist in Humanities/International Services fixture from retained ISA evidence.
